song.title: Jesus Thou Alone Art Worthy
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Jesus, Thou alone art worthy Ceaseless praises to receive; For Thy love and grace and goodness Rise o’er all our thoughts conceive.
[V2] 2) With adoring heart, we render Honor to Thy precious name, Overflowing with Thy mercies, Far and wide Thy worth proclaim.
[V3] 3) Praise Him! praise Him! praise the Savior! Saints, aloud your voices raise, Praise Him! praise Him! till in glory Perfected we’ll sing His praise.
song.author: Janetta Taylor Trench
